channel.title: WNwildNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from WNwildNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kew Gardens Prepares for Rare Titan Arum Bloom Known for Foul Odor
item.description: The titan arum, commonly called the corpse flower for its pungent smell, is expected to bloom soon at Kew Gardens' Princess of Wales Conservatory.

item.title: University of Wisconsin Lab Worker Admits to Poisoning Colleague Over Promotion Dispute
item.description: Makoto Kuroda, 41, a laboratory employee at the University of Wisconsin, has pleaded guilty to attempting to poison a coworker following a workplace conflict.

item.title: Heavily Filtered Social Media Photos Complicated Search for Missing Mexican Woman
item.description: Police searching for a missing woman in Mexico found the investigation complicated because her heavily edited online photos bore little resemblance to her actual appearance.

item.title: World's Largest Snack Store Stocks Over 35,000 Products from 70 Countries
item.description: Snack Kingdom, which claims the title of the world's largest snack retailer, spans more than 12,000 square meters and carries tens of thousands of products sourced globally.

item.title: Thailand Man Admits Deliberately Starting Forest Fire Out of Boredom
item.description: A 22-year-old in Thailand has confessed to intentionally igniting a local forest fire, telling authorities he did so because he was bored and seeking stimulation.
